field_values.action_summary: The group finds a small log cottage for shelter. Dorothy and Toto settle down on a bed of dried leaves to sleep, while the Scarecrow remains standing watch through the night.
field_values.camera_intent: Medium shots of the interior; Close-ups of Dorothy sleeping; Static wide shot of Scarecrow in shadows
field_values.end_state: scene resolves into the next narrative beat
movement_notes: Lighting consistency from small fire or moonlight source
Fixed placement of the dried leaf bed
field_values.transition_notes:
# Scene Contract: CH004_SC005

## Production Intent
Establish a temporary safe haven within the dark forest by transitioning from high-tension travel to exhausted rest. The visual tone must shift from the dread of the dense canopy to the localized, flickering warmth or moonlight of the log cottage interior.

## Required Cast
- dorothy (weary traveler, white dress)
- the_scarecrow (vigilant guard)
- toto (small dog)

## Required Environments
- log_branch_cottage (small, made of logs and branches)

## Continuity Constraints
- Lighting consistency from small fire or moonlight source
- Fixed placement of the dried leaf bed

## Beat List
- BT001: Arrival at the cottage
- BT002: Settling for rest
- BT003: The night watch
field_values.dialogue_relevance: dialogue supports scene intent and continuity
